editorial_recommendation.recommended_title: SEO Content Brief Template for Founder-Led SaaS Teams

editorial_recommendation.content_angle: Explain how lean SaaS teams can turn search opportunities into a prioritized SEO content plan, emphasizing realistic wins, pillar-supporting structure, and founder input so the page feels built for operationally lean teams.
